description: Waveshare RPi Relay Board (B) controller for Raspberry Pi 5 using libgpiod

dependencies.install_command: sudo apt update && sudo apt install gpiod bc

relay_control.sh.description: Bash relay controller with persistent GPIO daemon management

relay_web.py.description: Flask REST API + HTML dashboard for 8-channel relay web control

templates/index.html.description: Live HTML dashboard with 8 toggle buttons, auto-refresh every 3s

relay-web.service.description: systemd service to manage relay_web.py — enable once, then use systemctl start/stop/status relay-web

README.txt.description: User-facing installation, usage, and troubleshooting guide

CLAUDE.md.description: Critical facts, architecture notes, and constraints for AI assistants

pid_files.note: v2.x has two PIDs (gpioset + feeder), one per line

status.description: Show state table and daemon health

gpioget_exclusive_access.description: gpioget cannot read a line held by gpioset --mode=signal
gpioget_exclusive_access.impact: status command relies on saved state files, not live GPIO reads
gpioget_exclusive_access.mitigation: State files are updated on every relay_on/off call

rpi5_chip_number.description: RPi 5 GPIO chip may be gpiochip0 or gpiochip4 depending on firmware
rpi5_chip_number.mitigation: Script auto-detects the chip with the highest line count (≥27 required)

mode_exit_antipattern.description: gpioset --mode=exit releases the line immediately on exit
mode_exit_antipattern.impact: Relay clicks and releases in < 1ms — useless for sustained control

bash_dynamic_scoping_cmd_var.description: Bash has dynamic variable scope — a 'for cmd in ...' loop in a helper function clobbers the caller's 'local cmd' variable
bash_dynamic_scoping_cmd_var.impact: In v1.3.0, check_deps() used 'for cmd in gpioset gpioget gpiodetect', overwriting main()'s local cmd='stop' with 'gpiodetect'. The dispatch case never matched and the script silently exited 0.
bash_dynamic_scoping_cmd_var.mitigation: v1.4.0 fix: renamed loop variable in check_deps to 'dep'. Never reuse outer function variable names in inner loop variables.

state_lost_on_reboot.description: State files and daemon PIDs are in /tmp — lost on reboot
state_lost_on_reboot.mitigation: Add a systemd service that calls 'relay_control.sh reset' on startup

DEBUG.description: Set to 1 for verbose chip/version/state debug output
